suggestion: Shining Spears show an Aspect Shrine Token ability they should not have

note: The 11e clone kept only the pointer paragraph and dropped the section it points at. Restored all three canticles from source.
suggestion: Canticles of the Omnissiah is missing its rules text

note: Rule permits stacking; a missing space in the source text ('havealready') stopped the clause parsing. Data typo fixed and parser widened.
suggestion: Cannot attach a Datasmith to a Kastelan Robots unit that already has one

note: All four correct. Doctrines change BS/WS characteristics (so [HEAVY] stacks); Conqueror AP applies to shooting; Auto-Divinatory sets BS 3+. Cawl re-roll aura added.

note: Unlock lives in the MFM 'LEADER: KOMMANDOS' line, not the rules text. Prompted a full MFM audit that found five further missing leader unlocks.
suggestion: Slippery Git should let its bearer lead Kommandos

note: Export is correct (two entries, A3 ranged / A4 melee); the merge happens in a third-party table mod. Did surface a genuine double-count elsewhere, which was fixed.
suggestion: A weapon with both a melee and a ranged profile is stacked into one entry

note: Correctly refused: the Bodyguard rule needs a WARBOSS and Bigboss lacks the keyword. Exposed a real adjacent bug (the Starting Strength 20 gate was ignored), which was fixed.
suggestion: Two leaders on a 20-Boy mob does not work for Bigboss + Weirdboy

note: The 4++ comes from the Weavefield crest; Teleport grants Deep Strike. The two are mutually exclusive. Data matches source.
suggestion: No 4++ save when taking the Teleport crest

suggestion: Hearthfyre Arsenal enhancements missing for the Brokhyr
